summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Celesta Glow e-commerce redesign. All major features working correctly: Homepage with clean design, Product page with pricing, Checkout form with validation, Payment method toggle, Blog list, Navigation menu, Search overlay. Mobile viewport (390px) renders correctly without horizontal overflow. Fonts (Outfit, DM Sans) loading correctly. Input fields have proper h-12 (48px) height.

ui_bugs.issue: Sticky bottom bar does not appear - scroll threshold (400px) is higher than max scrollable distance (394px) on mobile viewport

issues: Validation errors persist visually even after filling fields (red border/background remains until form resubmit)

action_items: Consider lowering sticky bar scroll threshold from 400px to 300px to ensure it appears on mobile
Consider clearing validation error styling when user starts typing in a field
critical_code_review_comments: ProductPage.js line 40: showStickyBar threshold of 400px may be too high for mobile viewport where max scroll is ~394px

success_rate.frontend: 98% (all major flows working, minor sticky bar threshold issue)

context_for_next_testing_agent: All frontend features tested and working: Homepage (hero, trust bar, benefits, testimonials, CTA), Product page (image, pricing ₹399/₹450, benefits, accordion), Checkout (form validation, payment toggle), Blog list, Navigation menu, Search overlay. Fonts (Outfit/DM Sans) loading correctly. No horizontal overflow on mobile. Minor issue: sticky bar threshold too high for mobile scroll distance.

homepage.details: Hero section, trust badges (4/4), benefit cards (3/3), testimonials (2/2), final CTA all working

product_page.details: Product image, tag, title, rating, pricing (₹399 prepaid, ₹450 COD), benefits (3/3), Buy Now button, accordion sections (3/3) all working

checkout_flow.details: Form inputs (7/7) with h-12 height (48px), validation errors display correctly, state auto-populates from pincode

payment_method_toggle.details: Prepaid ₹399 and COD ₹450 (₹49 advance) toggle correctly, button text updates dynamically

search_overlay.details: Search opens/closes, input field visible, 4 search suggestions present

blog_list.details: Title 'Skincare Journal' displayed, 2 blog cards found

mobile_responsiveness.details: No horizontal overflow on any page (Homepage, Product, Blog), app container max-width 448px working

fonts.details: Outfit font for headings, DM Sans for body text loading correctly

design_colors.details: Sky blue (#0ea5e9) primary color, proper text contrast (slate-900 for titles, slate-600 for descriptions)
